pr.title: Add password hashing helper
pr.description: Hashes user passwords before storing them.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+package auth
+
+import (
+	"crypto/md5"
+	"encoding/hex"
+)
+
+func HashPassword(password string) string {
+	sum := md5.Sum([]byte(password))
+	return hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
+}
+

planted_defects.description: Weak cryptography: passwords are hashed with unsalted MD5, which is fast and broken, making stored password hashes trivial to crack with rainbow tables or brute force; use bcrypt, scrypt, or argon2 instead.
